SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.api

Interface IRiskScore

All Known Implementing Classes:
ImmutableRiskScore, RiskScore
public interface IRiskScore
Public interface for TLS risk score results. Provides a quantitative risk assessment using an average-based scoring model with severity floors, mapped to letter grades and traffic-light risk levels.
Author:
Milton Smith

  • Method Details

    • getTotalScore

      int getTotalScore()
      Total score across all categories (0-100).
      Returns:
      Total risk score

    • getLetterGrade

      IRiskScore.LetterGrade getLetterGrade()
      Letter grade derived from total score.
      Returns:
      Letter grade

    • getRiskLevel

      IRiskScore.RiskLevel getRiskLevel()
      Overall risk level derived from the letter grade.
      Returns:
      Risk level

    • getCategoryScores

      IRiskScore.ICategoryScore[] getCategoryScores()
      Per-category score breakdowns.
      Returns:
      Array of category scores

    • getCategoryScore

      IRiskScore.ICategoryScore getCategoryScore(IRiskScore.ScoreCategory category)
      Get a specific category's score by enum.
      Parameters:
      category - The category to retrieve
      Returns:
      Category score, or null if not found

    • getCategoryScore

      IRiskScore.ICategoryScore getCategoryScore(String categoryKey)
      Get a specific category's score by string key. Works for both built-in categories (e.g., "PROTOCOLS") and user-defined custom categories (e.g., "PCI_COMPLIANCE").
      Parameters:
      categoryKey - The category key string
      Returns:
      Category score, or null if not found

    • getHostUrl

      String getHostUrl()
      Host URL that was scored.
      Returns:
      Host URL string

    • getDiagnostics

      IRiskScore.IScoringDiagnostic[] getDiagnostics()
      Diagnostics collected during scoring (rule evaluation failures, data-gathering warnings, etc.). Returns an empty array when scoring completed without issues.
